---
title: Die beschleunigte Stadt. 1856 – 1914
subtitle: Stadt.Geschichte.Basel, Band 6
description: Band 6 der neunbändigen Buchreihe Stadt.Geschichte.Basel.
lang: de
categories:
- Band
order: 6
doi: 10.21255/sgb-06-810743
license: CC BY-NC 4.0
author:
- name: Patrick Kury
citation:
  type: book
  title: Die beschleunigte Stadt. 1856 – 1914
  publisher: Christoph Merian Verlag
  publisher-place: Basel
  issued: 2024
  url: https://doi.org/10.21255/sgb-06-810743
  editor:
  - Patrick Kury
appendix-cite-as: display
other-links:
- text: Verlagsseite (eMono)
  icon: book
  href: https://emono.unibas.ch/stadtgeschichtebasel/catalog/book/band6
listing:
- id: chapters
  type: table
  contents:
  - sgb-*/index.qmd
  sort: order
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
  page-size: 100
  fields:
  - title
  - author
  field-display-names:
    title: Titel
    author: Autor:innen
date-modified: last-modified
---

::: {.callout-note title="Lizenz" appearance="simple"}
© Stadt.Geschichte.Basel / Christoph Merian Verlag. Text lizenziert unter [CC BY-NC 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/). Quelle: [doi.org/10.21255/sgb-06-810743](https://doi.org/10.21255/sgb-06-810743)
:::

## Kapitel

::: {#chapters}
:::
